rawText: Suburban warehouse and distribution center at 456 Industrial Pkwy, Memphis TN 38103. Single story joisted masonry construction, built 1999. TIV: $2,100,000. Partial sprinkler system (rack storage only). Local alarm only. Roof last replaced 2012. Warehouse/storage occupancy with mixed goods including some electronics.
notes: Older warehouse: moderate construction age, partial protection, no severe perils
